problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: If Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
